name: NEOGEN CORP
business: Neogen Corporation develops, manufactures, and markets diagnostic test kits and complementary products for food safety, as well as veterinary instruments, pharmaceuticals, vaccines, and genomics services for animal safety. Its Food Safety segment serves food and feed producers to detect contaminants and ensure hygiene, while its Animal Safety segment supports livestock producers, veterinarians, and companion animal owners with health and biosecurity products.

exposures.sentence: Our Food Safety segment consists primarily of diagnostic test kits and complementary products (e.g., culture media) sold to food and animal feed producers and processors to preserve the safety and quality of food to prevent contamination and foodborne illnesses such as foodborne pathogens, spoilage organisms, natural toxins, food allergens, and ruminant by-products.
Neogen markets BotVax B, the only USDA-approved vaccine for the prevention of botulism Type B in horses.
Neogen manufactures various rapid testing tools to determine general sanitation and hygiene.

Neogen's Animal Safety segment is engaged in the development, manufacture, marketing and distribution of veterinary instruments, pharmaceuticals, vaccines, topicals, parasiticides, diagnostic products, rodent control products, cleaners, disinfectants, insect control products and genomics testing services for the worldwide animal safety market.

catalysts.event: Completed divestiture of global Cleaners & Disinfectants business to Kersia Group
catalysts.sentence: On July 18, 2025, we completed the divestiture of our global Cleaners & Disinfectants business to Kersia Group for $130.0 million in cash at closing, plus contingent consideration tied to future performance of the business.
